name: Dropdown Menu
goal: Provide a button-triggered action menu with keyboard navigation for row actions, toolbar overflow, profile menus, and sort options.
description: A multi-element component: ce-dropdown-menu (parent), ce-menu-item, ce-menu-separator, and ce-menu-group. The parent uses the native Popover API (popover=auto) for top-layer rendering and built-in light-dismiss. JS positioning handles 6 placement values. Keyboard navigation follows the ARIA menu pattern: ArrowDown/Up navigate, Enter/Space activate, Escape closes, Home/End jump to first/last. Emits ce-menu-select with the activated item's value.
limitations: Viewport overflow-flip (automatic placement flip when the panel would clip the viewport edge) is deferred to v2. Icon names in ce-menu-item are rendered as text; integrate with an icon set by replacing the icon slot content. The shortcut hint is a visual-only display; key binding itself must be wired by the consumer.

props.name: open
props.description: When true the menu panel is visible; setting to false closes it.

props.name: placement
props.description: Panel placement relative to the trigger. 6 values covering top and bottom axes with start, end, and center alignment.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, the trigger click is ignored and the menu cannot be opened.

events.name: ce-menu-select
events.description: Fires when a menu item is activated by click, Enter, or Space. Detail contains the activated item's value string.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The element that toggles the menu on click. Should be an interactive element (button). Receives aria-haspopup=menu, aria-expanded, and aria-controls automatically.
Menu items, separators, and groups. Accepts ce-menu-item, ce-menu-separator, and ce-menu-group elements.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Group label and shortcut hint font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Group label, icon, and shortcut hint muted text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Item vertical padding and icon gap.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Item and group label horizontal padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-red
cssVariables.description: Text color for ce-menu-item with tone=danger.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-red-bg
cssVariables.description: Hover background for ce-menu-item with tone=danger.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Transition timing for panel open/close animation.

cssVariables.name: --ce-dropdown-menu-z
cssVariables.description: z-index override for the menu panel. Default 1000.

globalDependencies.purpose: Opens the menu panel in the browser top-layer.
Removes the menu panel from the browser top-layer.
Reads trigger and panel geometry for JS positioning.
Caches previously-focused element for focus-return on close.
Captures keydown events for keyboard navigation while the menu is open.

sideEffects.description: Calls showPopover() / hidePopover() on the internal panel element.
sideEffects.reason: Required to enter/exit the browser top-layer for correct stacking.

sideEffects.description: Attaches window scroll and resize listeners while the menu is open.
sideEffects.reason: Keeps the panel aligned to the trigger during scroll and resize.

sideEffects.description: Captures document keydown events while the menu is open for keyboard navigation.
sideEffects.reason: Menu keyboard pattern (ARIA APG) requires capturing ArrowDown/Up/Home/End/Enter/Space/Escape.

sideEffects.description: Captures and restores document.activeElement on open/close.
sideEffects.reason: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.3: focus must return to the trigger after the menu closes.

a11y.notes: The menu panel carries role=menu. Each ce-menu-item carries role=menuitem and tabindex managed by roving-tabindex (first item gets tabindex=0 on open; others -1). ce-menu-separator carries role=separator. ce-menu-group carries role=group with aria-labelledby pointing to the visible group label. The slotted trigger receives aria-haspopup=menu, aria-expanded (synced with open), and aria-controls pointing at the panel id. Focus moves to the first enabled menu item on open and returns to the trigger on close. Disabled items are skipped in keyboard navigation.

subElements.description: A single action row inside ce-dropdown-menu. Attributes: value (string id), icon (string), disabled (boolean), tone (default|danger), shortcut (string kbd hint).
Horizontal divider between menu sections. role=separator.
Labeled section grouping related menu items. Attribute: label (string). role=group with aria-labelledby.

cdrDeviations: CDR-001: The placement enum has 6 values encoding a closed 2D coordinate space (top/bottom × start/center/end). Not a vocabulary alias set — the same geometry as CSS Anchor Positioning and floating-ui. Deviation documented here and in CONCEPT.md.
